derived.causal_summary: Phase 008 deprecates the mcp-magicpath skill now that mcp-open-design is the live terminal design transport built in phase 002, live-verified in 004, and corrected in 007. The 16-file skill folder is deleted, the parity protocol in sk-interface-design and the prompt design usecase in sk-prompt are rewritten onto mcp-open-design, every live reference is swept across the design and prompt skills plus the skills index, the reciprocal graph sibling edges are dropped with mcp-figma repointed to mcp-open-design, three skills are version-bumped with changelogs, and the 147 install packet is marked superseded. Historical records are preserved and the skill-advisor sqlite rescan is deferred.
